name: chain_i_spent_6_months_figuring_out_ai_ugc_so_
method:
I spent 6 months figuring out AI UGC so you don't have to.

and thats how we went from 0 → 4M views/week → $20K MRR with $0 ad spend.

The tech stack. The prompts. The automation pipeline. The account

stages.task: Scrape TikTok/IG trending sounds, hooks, formats in our niches (productivity, faith, finance)
Generate 5 UGC video scripts using claude -p with trending hooks, consequence-first structure, specific numbers
Render AI avatar videos: TTS (Bark/Coqui) → face animation (SadTalker/Wav2Lip) → captions (whisper) → assembly (ffmpeg)
Post to account cluster with optimal timing, platform-specific aspect ratios, hashtag sets
24h post-publish: scrape metrics, score by completion rate + shares, identify winner patterns for next cycle
